query: SELECT name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products GROUP BY name HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3aN4XovBvgLTwiy.root --database jWmfVYBaikHBYpPLbpiijG --execute SELECT name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM products GROUP BY name HAVING cnt > 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 10; SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM products;
